    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    HmacSignatureUtil
    Generates HMAC-SHA256 signatures required by SPIFF Import and Object APIs.
    HttpClientUtil
    Shared HTTP client utility for all SPIFF API calls.
    SpiffAttributes
    Metadata attributes returned alongside SPIFF API responses.
    SpiffErrorType
     
    SpiffErrorTypeProvider
     
    SpiffExtension
     
    SpiffHmacConfiguration
     
    SpiffHmacConnection
    Holds HMAC-SHA256 connection state for SPIFF Import and Object APIs.
    SpiffHmacConnectionProvider
     
    SpiffImportOperations
     
    SpiffOAuthConnection
    Holds OAuth 2.0 connection state for the SPIFF Reporting API.
    SpiffOAuthConnectionProvider
     
    SpiffObjectOperations
     
    SpiffReportingConfiguration
     
    SpiffReportingOperations
